sql: SELECT COUNT(article_title) FROM articles WHERE title_word_count >= 10;
template: SELECT COUNT(article_title) FROM articles WHERE title_word_count >= {title-word-count};
question: How many articles have titles with ten or more words?
label: training

sql: SELECT SUM(author_count) FROM articles WHERE reference_count <= 66;
template: SELECT SUM(author_count) FROM articles WHERE reference_count <= {reference-count};
question: What is the total number of authors for all articles that cite 66 or fewer references?
label: training

question: What is the total number of references cited across all articles?
label: training

sql: SELECT MAX(reference_count) FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id FROM article_author WHERE author_name = 'Van-Thuan Pham');
template: SELECT MAX(reference_count) FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT article_id FROM article_author WHERE author_name = {author-name});
question: What is the highest number of references cited in any article authored by Van-Thuan Pham?
label: training

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE article_id NOT IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited);
template: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE article_id NOT IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited);
question: How many articles are there that have not been cited by any other articles?
label: training

sql: SELECT article_title FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(citation_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS citation_count FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited)))
template: SELECT article_title FROM articles WHERE article_id IN (SELECT article_id_cited FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited HAVING COUNT(*) = (SELECT MAX(citation_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS citation_count FROM citing_cited GROUP BY article_id_cited)))
question: Which article has the highest number of citations?
answer: Learning to Parse Database Queries Using Inductive Logic Programming
label: training
